title: X.509 Certificate General-Purpose Extended Key Usage (EKU) for Document Signing
source: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME
abstract: RFC 5280 specifies several extended key purpose identifiers (KeyPurposeIds) for X.509 certificates.  This document defines a general-purpose Document-Signing KeyPurposeId for inclusion in the Extended Key Usage (EKU) extension of X.509 public key certificates.  Document-Signing applications may require that the EKU extension be present and that a Document-Signing KeyPurposeId be indicated in order for the certificate to be acceptable to that Document-Signing application.
